title: What if Anno is a prophet
display_title: What if Anno is a prophet
wikitext:
[]: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by santi » Thu Dec 17, 2015 12:30 am I mean.. if anno is telling a real story which will happen in a future

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 17, 2015 1:14 am ...no.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 17, 2015 1:25 am Considering the show is based this year and we're no closer to the rapture of Instrumentality, I'd say the prediction was off its mark.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 17, 2015 1:50 am We're still waiting for the Japanese conquest of Hawaii (as in Gunbuster ).

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Chuckman » Fri Dec 18, 2015 12:16 am Has Anno seen the man with the typewriter?

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 19, 2015 2:51 pm If not a Prophet... ...perhaps the Emissary? "You are the Anno." "You exist here." "And it's okay for you to exist here."

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Moap » Sat Dec 19, 2015 11:02 pm I for one, would gladly join the cult of Anno.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Chuckman » Sun Dec 20, 2015 8:20 pm Someone told me the words of the prophet are written on the subway walls.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Rosenakahara » Sun Dec 27, 2015 9:52 am Then we are all screwed, I for one welcome my new blue haired overlord. Mostly because team blue is best team.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by NemZ » Mon Dec 28, 2015 1:21 am I'd say this has gone more than far enough.

[]: Re: What if Anno is a prophet? Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Dec 28, 2015 1:24 am Anno made anime real????
